keyFeatures.en: Streamlines the collection of personal, financial, and sensitive documents.
keyFeatures.zh: 简化个人、财务及其他敏感文件的收集过程。

keyFeatures.en: Keeps your business moving by streamlining document collection.
keyFeatures.zh: 通过简化文件收集流程，使您的业务保持顺畅。

description.en: Basic features for small businesses and individuals.
description.zh: 适用于小型企业和个人的基本功能。

weaknesses.en: Limited features and no commercial use options.
weaknesses.zh: 功能有限且没有商业使用选项。

positioning.en: A tool for streamlining document collection for businesses and individuals.
positioning.zh: 为企业和个人简化文件收集流程的工具。
